description: Delete 'it's worth noting' opener, keep the claim
before: It's worth noting that procurement consolidation could yield $12M in FY26.
after: Procurement consolidation could yield $12M in FY26.
trigger_regex: (?i)(it'?s worth noting|it should be noted|it'?s important to note)

description: Delete 'at the end of the day'
before: At the end of the day, vendor consolidation reduces risk.
Moving forward, the team will implement category management.
after: The team will implement category management.

before: Ventia should leverage its panel agreements to drive savings.
after: Ventia should use its panel agreements to drive savings.

before: The procurement team should utilise the new vendor panel.
after: The procurement team should use the new vendor panel.

description: Delete or replace 'robust' in non-technical context
before: This is a robust approach to cost reduction.
after: This approach reduces cost by targeting the highest-spend categories first.

before: This transformative initiative will reshape how Ventia manages its supply chain.
after: This initiative consolidates 47 vendors and cuts tail spend by 30%.

before: This section will delve into the key cost drivers.
after: This section examines the key cost drivers.

before: In order to achieve savings, the team must consolidate vendors.
after: To achieve savings, the team must consolidate vendors.

description: Replace 'at this point in time' with 'now' or delete
before: At this point in time, the panel has not been activated.
after: The panel has not been activated.

before: The margin compression is notable — it is what it is.

description: Replace vague 'synergies' with specific benefit or delete
before: The merger will unlock synergies across the business.
after: The merger will reduce shared-services headcount by 15%.

before: This approach could potentially yield $8M in savings.
after: This approach could yield $8M in savings.

description: Delete 'it could be argued that', assert directly
before: It could be argued that the current vendor panel is underperforming.
after: The current vendor panel is underperforming.

description: Replace vague magnitude words with a specific figure or delete
before: The initiative represents a substantial opportunity for cost reduction.
after: The initiative represents a $15M opportunity for cost reduction.
